_test_intent: FAIL Layer 2 (Citation Validity) — citations are not on the approved domain list (non-.gov sources)
title: CO-50 Insurance Denial: What It Means
meta_description: Learn what a CO-50 denial means and how to appeal a not medically necessary determination.
target_problem: Patient received a CO-50 denial and needs to understand it.
body:
A CO-50 denial means your insurance company determined the service was not medically necessary.

This content does not constitute legal or medical advice. MyAdvocate is not a law firm. For questions specific to your situation, consult a qualified attorney or healthcare professional.
